name: Sony WH-1000XM5
quirks: Microphone capture uses HFP/HSP on normal Bluetooth stacks; keep playback on A2DP and prefer another microphone.
Avoid forcing LDAC maximum bitrate on unstable links.
LDAC needs a larger PipeWire loopback floor than AAC/SBC-XQ when the desktop is under load.
Use profile latency to preserve codec quality instead of falling back below AAC for ordinary crackle recovery.
source_notes: Sony WH-1000XM5 specifications list SBC, AAC, and LDAC formats plus A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, and HSP profiles.
